headline: Private Credit's Liquidity Crunch: APO & ARES Cap Withdrawals Again
summary: APO and ARES cap withdrawals again as redemption requests outpace fund limits, highlighting persistent liquidity pressures across private credit.

raw.headline: Private Credit's Liquidity Crunch: APO & ARES Cap Withdrawals Again
raw.summary: APO and ARES cap withdrawals again as redemption requests outpace fund limits, highlighting persistent liquidity pressures across private credit.

headline: On 26 June 2026, APL Sweets OÜ (registry code 17383212), a subsidiary of Apollo Group OÜ, entered into a five-year Development and Franchise Agreement with Krispy Kreme Doughnut Corporation (North Carolina, United States).
summary: Krispy Kreme® is a globally recognized fresh doughnut brand known for its iconic Original Glazed™ doughnut and signature hot-off-the-line, melt-in-your-mouth experience. Founded in 1937, Krispy Kreme operates in more than 40 countries around the world. Under the agreement, APL Sweets OÜ has obtained the right to develop and open up to 25 Krispy Kreme branded outlets of 3 varying sizes across the Baltic States during the period 2026–2030. headline: Morgan Stanley Weighs $1.3 Billion Dallas Bet
summary: The Dallas City Council approved an economic incentive package that would grant the bank up to $18.5 million in economic development grants.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley Weighs $1.3 Billion Dallas Bet
